FANTA

Scroll

FLAVOUR CHANGED

Born from real fruit flavours, Fanta is the brand that believes fun shouldn't have limits. From the iconic orange to tropical twists, every sip is a burst of bold, effervescent flavour crafted to spark your sense of adventure. Feel the fizz, taste the fun.

Crisp lemon-lime fizz that cuts right through the heat.

Bold orange flavour with a signature tropical fizz.

Sun-ripened mango goodness in every golden sip.
